detail: Full acceptance suite 60/60 PASSED on bh_8xP150_p2p sim (mesh (2,4), FABRIC_1D/FABRIC_1D_RING). Prior on-device blocker (fabric router sync timeout) was transient/stale — fabric now brings up on all 8 devices in ~3s. Covered: bf16/f32/bf8b x TILE/RM x 5 shapes x Linear/Ring, program-cache reuse, ring wraparound, output_tensor path, nonparticipating-unchanged.
